title: rubus idaeus subsp. subcandicans
intro: Rubus idaeus subsp. subcandicans, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan red raspberry, is a subspecies of the red raspberry plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus subsp. subcandicans include potential anti-cancer properties, improved cardiovascular health, and support for digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties.
